mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_school_recommendation( report_id, school_id, match_score, match_tier, probability_estimate, confidence_level, gpa_score, language_score, soft_background_score, school_selectivity_score, admission_bar_score, school_heat_score, reason_tags_json, ai_summary ) VALUES( #{reportId}, #{schoolId}, #{matchScore}, #{matchTier}, #{probabilityEstimate}, #{confidenceLevel}, #{gpaScore}, #{languageScore}, #{softBackgroundScore}, #{schoolSelectivityScore}, #{admissionBarScore}, #{schoolHeatScore}, #{reasonTagsJson}, #{aiSummary} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, report_id, school_id, match_score, match_tier, probability_estimate, confidence_level, gpa_score, language_score, soft_background_score, school_selectivity_score, admission_bar_score, school_heat_score, reason_tags_json, ai_summary, created_at FROM ai_school_recommendation WHERE report_id = #{reportId} ORDER BY probability_estimate DESC, match_score DESC, id ASC
